description_long: This object depicts a small bird resting on a patch of ground covered with leaves and grass. The bird has a compact body with a rounded head, a short neck, and a relatively short tail. Its plumage appears mottled with earthy tones, blending well with the natural debris around it, suggesting camouflage. The beak is short and conical, suitable for seed-eating, and the legs are slender and lightly colored. The bird is positioned low to the ground, with its body slightly raised and head forward, as if alert or foraging. The surrounding ground is textured with a mix of green, brown, and tan hues, indicating a typical urban park or garden setting.
description: A small, mottled bird with a short conical beak and earthy plumage, resting on leafy ground. The bird blends into its natural surroundings with subtle brown and green tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, rounded head, and short tail, with mottled plumage blending into the leafy ground.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the bird's face, short beak, and the upright posture of its head, with more detail on the ground texture.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view displaying the bird's back, tail, and the spread of its plumage, with the head slightly turned.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the bird's profile, showing the beak, head, and a clearer outline of the legs and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with brown, tan, and gray patches
